summary: Excellent soundboard‑type recording of a favorite show highlighted by a moving Brokedown Palace despite a minor lyric slip.
review: The reviewer rates this concert a top‑tier performance, praising the overall set and especially the heartfelt rendition of Brokedown Palace. The MP3 source is noted as clearer and deeper than other uploads, with reduced crowd noise that suggests a soundboard‑derived mix. The only drawback mentioned is Brent’s small lyrical stumble at the end of the song.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review emphasizes both a strong musical performance and high‑quality audio, leading to a high rating; confidence is medium due to limited sample size.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Less crowd noise, more depth, clearer MP3 conversion; no major sound issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall very enjoyable set; the show flows well and is recommended by the reviewer.

band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland slips on a lyric at the end of Brokedown Palace.
